source.title: [0.4] League Mechanic Reward Cheat Sheet
source.author: GuyThatDies
source.note: Guaranteed reward for completing league mechanic in the zone. Guaranteed only once; resetting zone does not refresh the guarantee.

notes: Keep this file separate from campaign-bonuses.json: these are temporary/loot rewards, not permanent character bonuses.
duplicateInCurrentGuide marks legacy guide overlap; overlay still shows the guaranteed league reward for consistency.
For long-term cleanup, move old hardcoded league reward texts out of guide.json and render them from this file instead.
Some Interlude locations are missing as separate guide cards in current guide.json; use raw scene/aliases for detection when possible.
